ead.archdesc:
======= RMM02639Eugene Sonnenberg Boerner papers2639Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
November 20082B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
agricrghisThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:30:04 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Eugene Sonnenberg Boerner papers
Boerner, Eugene Sonnenberg, 1893-1966.
2639
35 cubic feet.
1894-1968 Collection material in English Personal and family papers include legal documents; diaries; letters from friends and relatives; memorabilia and papers relating to his student days at the University of Wisconsin and the University of Illinois. Correspondence, Legal Documents, Memorabilia, Publications. <<<<<<< HEAD 75 ======= 75 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2067726
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Eugene Sonnenberg Boerner was a rose hybridist, horticulturist, and director of research for the Jackson & Perkins Company, Newark, New York.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Personal and family papers include legal documents; diaries; letters from friends and relatives; memorabilia and papers relating to his student days at the University of Wisconsin and the University of Illinois; financial and other records concerning his model farm "Gene's Landing," on Seneca Lake in New York. Professional papers include foreign and domestic correspondence on rose growing and judging; flower photographs; notes and patent books that describe and picture numerous rose varieties and perennials he developed; domestic and foreign parentage seedling books and hybridizing records; and many lectures, articles, photographs, and notes concerning floriculture and his work for Jackson & Perkins Company.
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
May 5, 1970
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, November 2008
Date modified:
Jude Corina, February 2018
Cite As:
Eugene Sonnenberg Boerner papers, #2639. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Horticulturists. Roses -- Hybridization. Horticulture. Floriculture. Jackson & Perkins Company
